title: tk init/upgrade: union-merge activity.jsonl and self-heal merge driver registration
description:
Two systemic causes of .tick/ merge conflicts when merging branches/worktrees:

1. .tick/activity/activity.jsonl has no merge attribute -> default text merge conflicts whenever two branches both append (the most common .tick conflict). Fix: EnsureGitAttributes (internal/github/git.go) should also write '.tick/activity/activity.jsonl merge=union'. Union merge concatenates both sides' lines without conflict markers; entries are self-contained JSON with a ts field, so interleaved order is harmless. Verify any reader of activity.jsonl tolerates non-chronological line order (sort by ts on read if not).

2. merge.tick.driver is registered via 'git config' (per-clone, .git/config) by tk init only — fresh clones and new machines silently lack it even though the versioned .gitattributes references merge=tick. Fix: self-heal — have tk re-run ConfigureMergeDriver when it detects the attribute present but the driver unconfigured (e.g. on mutating commands, or at least in tk upgrade and a doctor-style check), so issue JSON merges always get the smart driver.

Files: internal/github/git.go (+ tests in internal/github/git_test.go), cmd/tk/cmd/init.go, possibly cmd/tk/cmd/upgrade.go.

Test cases:
- EnsureGitAttributes on a repo with the old single-line .gitattributes adds the union line, idempotently (run twice -> one line)
- Two branches each appending distinct lines to activity.jsonl merge cleanly with merge=union (script-level test or documented manual check)
- Driver self-heal: clone-like dir with .gitattributes containing merge=tick but no merge.tick.driver in config -> after running tk <mutating cmd or upgrade>, config is set
notes: 2026-06-12 07:00 - Superseded by epic jux (PR #14, merged 2026-06-11), which shipped both halves stronger than specced here: (1) activity.jsonl gets a real tk merge-activity driver (parses JSONL, dedupes by ts+tick+action+actor, sorts by ts, strips conflict markers) instead of plain merge=union — attribute line now written by EnsureGitAttributes (internal/github/git.go:34); (2) driver registration self-heals lazily on every tk invocation via CheckAndInstallMergeDrivers wired into rootCmd PersistentPreRunE (internal/github/git.go:14), not just init/upgrade — it also upgrades old clones that have merge.tick but lack merge.tick-activity.
acceptance_criteria: go test ./internal/github/... passes incl. new tests; fresh tk init writes both attribute lines; re-init on existing repo is idempotent
closed_reason: Superseded by epic jux (PR #14): merge-activity driver replaces union merge; lazy self-registration on every tk invocation replaces init/upgrade self-heal
